title: Secure, optimize, and deploy database solutions
summary: Learn to protect data with encryption and access controls, tune query performance, implement CI/CD pipelines for database projects, and integrate SQL solutions with Azure services.

sections.title: Secure, optimize, and deploy database solutions
sections.summary: Learn to protect data with encryption and access controls, tune query performance, implement CI/CD pipelines for database projects, and integrate SQL solutions with Azure services.

lessons.title: Implement data security and compliance with SQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement data security and compliance features in SQL Server, Azure SQL, and SQL databases in Microsoft Fabric, including encryption, masking, Row-Level Security, and auditing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-data-security-compliance/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement data security and compliance with SQL

lessons.title: Optimize database performance
lessons.content_md:
Optimize Azure SQL Database performance by choosing the right service tier and managing concurrency with isolation levels. Analyze queries with execution plans and DMVs. Use Query Store for plan management and resolve blocking and deadlocks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/optimize-database-performance/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement CI/CD by using SQL Database Projects
lessons.content_md:
Implement CI/CD for SQL Database Projects with source control, branching, schema drift detection, automated pipelines, and testing strategies using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-cicd-sql-database-projects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement CI/CD by using SQL Database Projects

lessons.title: Integrate SQL solutions with Azure services
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Data API Builder to create REST and GraphQL APIs for SQL databases, deploy to Azure, configure monitoring, and implement event-driven patterns for change handling.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/integrate-sql-solutions-azure-services/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Integrate SQL solutions with Azure services

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Secure, optimize, and deploy database solutions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Secure, optimize, and deploy database solutions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
